commands.review_summary:
The branch trims trailing assistant messages from compaction-timeout recovery snapshots and adds helper tests for pre-compaction and current-snapshot fallback selection.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +30. Total +38 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main can select a compaction-timeout snapshot ending in an assistant message, and agent-core rejects continuation from an assistant-tail context. I did not run a live long-session provider/channel timeout reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is indicated; maintainers should wait for required checks and decide whether the helper-level proof is enough for this session-state recovery change.

target.title: fix(agents): trim assistant-tail compaction snapshots
target.body:
Fixes #87472.

## Summary
- trim trailing assistant turns from compaction-timeout recovery snapshots before they are handed downstream for retry/replay decisions
- preserve the underlying persisted transcript; only the selected recovery snapshot is normalized
- add regressions for both pre-compaction snapshot selection and current-snapshot fallback

## Real behavior proof
Behavior or issue addressed: Compaction-timeout recovery must not hand downstream retry/replay code a transcript whose last message has `role: assistant`; that shape causes `Cannot continue from message role: assistant` on provider fallback/continuation.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout at `/Users/andy/openclaw/openclaw-87472`, branch `fix/compaction-timeout-assistant-tail-87472`, Node via repo scripts, dependencies installed with `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran `pnpm exec tsx -e ...` against the real `selectCompactionTimeoutSnapshot` helper with a pre-compaction snapshot ending in an assistant turn, then ran the requested vitest suites.

Evidence after fix:
```json
{
  "source": "pre-compaction",
  "sessionIdUsed": "session-pre",
  "messageCount": 1,
  "tailRole": "user",
  "assistantTailPresent": false
}
```

Additional command output:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/compaction-timeout.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts` -> 5 test files passed, 258 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts` -> 3 test files passed, 244 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/code-mode.test.ts` -> 2 test files passed, 64 tests passed.

Observed result after fix: The selected compaction-timeout recovery snapshot keeps the pre-compaction session but trims the already-delivered assistant tail, so the recovered snapshot ends on the user turn instead of an assistant turn.

What was not tested: I did not run a live Anthropic/Discord long-session compaction timeout because the bug path is deterministic at the snapshot-selection boundary and the provider failure requires a long timed-out compaction scenario.

## Author attribution
If this PR is squash-merged or reworked, please preserve author attribution for `Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>` or include:

`Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`
